subject: Full Heal — item card showing a syringe or medical injection device with a green tip and red body, rendered against a plain light background
description: The card art depicts a syringe or medical injection tool centered in the frame. The device has a green glowing tip or needle and a red-orange cylindrical barrel. The syringe rests diagonally, with its needle end pointing down-left. A plain light-grey background keeps the focus on the object. The depiction is clean and iconic, consistent with a classic healing-item visual from early Pokemon TCG design. The rendering has a slightly stylized, retro quality.
foreground: diagonal syringe with green glowing tip and red cylindrical body
